scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:add-ios: npm run sync && npx cap add ios && npm run generate:icons
scripts.cap:add-android: npm run sync && npx cap add android && npm run generate:icons
scripts.cap:run-ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run ios
scripts.cap:run-android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run android
